title: conyza chionea
intro: Conyza chionea, also known as White Fleabane, is a flowering plant belonging to the daisy family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in wound healing due to its antiseptic properties. Conyza chionea can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various ailments.
